name: 二次模型
subject: math
curriculum_points: HSA-CED.A.2 Create equations in two or more variables to represent relationships between quantities; graph equations on coordinate axes with labels and scales.

HSF-IF.B.4 For a function that models a relationship between two quantities, interpret key features of graphs and tables in terms of the quantities, and sketch graphs showing key features given a verbal description of the relationship. Key features include: intercepts; intervals where the function is increasing, decreasing, positive, or negative; relative maximums and minimums; symmetries; end behavior; and periodicity.
HSF-IF.B.6 Calculate and interpret the average rate of change of a function (presented symbolically or as a table) over a specified interval. Estimate the rate of change from a graph.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 二次函数参数调节：改变 a/b/c 观察图像变化

expressions.latex: y = a x^2 + b x + c

interactive_resources.description: Desmos 二次函数交互：滑块调节 y=ax²+bx+c
GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「二次模型」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HSA-CED.A.2 Create equations in two or more variables to represent relationships between quantities; graph equations on …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HSF-IF.B.4 For a function that models a relationship between two quantities, int… 对理解「二次模型」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
